# html-to-markdown-rs CLI Reference

Use this skill when invoking, documenting, or changing the html-to-markdown-rs command-line interface.

- `html-to-markdown`: Convert HTML to Markdown
- `html-to-markdown mcp`: Run as an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server.
